articles.title: West Indies hope new ball brings change of luck after Udara bosses first day
articles.description: "This is my third chance in Tests, so I thought I want to go big. I made it, so I'm really happy about that," Lahiru Udara says after scoring his first Test century

articles.title: Lahiru Udara 188 carries the fight for Sri Lanka
articles.description: Record stand with Kamindu Mendis puts visitors in commanding position despite late West Indies strikes

articles.title: Harmer and Cook help Essex hand out Hove thrashing
articles.description: Eagles captain hits 46 off 17 balls to boost total before claiming two wickets and effecting a run-out

articles.title: Stone holds nerve as Notts seal one-run win to stay top
articles.description: Munsey continues hot streak with fifth half-century in six before Lancashire mess up run chase

articles.title: Smale trail plots path for Glamorgan to win again
articles.description: Sam Hain hits 63 not out from 46 but Warwickshire unable to knock home side off course in chase

articles.title: Bairstow, Moeen gun down Durham as Yorkshire close on knockouts
articles.description: Durham get off to flyer thanks to Alex Lees' 73 off 35 before stumbling, unable to defend 205-9

articles.title: Johnson flattens Lancashire to keep Durham's Finals Day hopes alive
articles.description: Lancashire officially eliminated after sliding to 79 all out at Chester-le-Street

articles.title: Hose, Raza get Rapids flowing before Kent collapse
articles.description: Visitors blown away for 59 with Allison, Raza and Mir all taking two apiece

articles.title: Dawkins hundred, Flintoff 79* as England U19s level series
articles.description: Unbroken 191-run partnership sees South Africa comfortably overhauled

articles.title: Winfield-Hill 99, Kalis 86* as Yorkshire romp to first Blast win
articles.description: Anika Learoyd's unbeaten hundred in vain as Somerset fall short in chase of 211

articles.title: 'That story is done' - Aakash Chopra picks his India playing XI for 2nd T20I between India and England
articles.description: Apart from picking India's playing XI for the second T20I against England, Aakash Chopra also suggested a change in the batting order from the last game.

articles.title: 'I don't want to put too much pressure' - Sam Curran on prospect of replacing Ben Stokes in England's Test side
articles.description: The Surrey all-rounder stated that he would happily take over the vacant spot left behind by Stokes if asked to do so

articles.title: 'Family, friends, teammates, fans…' - Ben Stokes pens emotional farewell message after retiring from international cricket
articles.description: Stokes brought the curtain down on an illustrious international career during the third Test against New Zealand at Trent Bridge.

articles.title: ENG vs IND, 2nd T20I: England announces playing XI as Jofra Archer returns, Josh Tongue handed T20I debut
articles.description: The duo replaces Saqib Mahmood and Luke Wood, who featured in the rain-affected series opener.

articles.title: England hand maiden ODI call-up to James Coles; Jofra Archer returns for India series
articles.description: Archer returns to England's ODI setup for the first time since featuring against the West Indies in November last year.

articles.title: 'How he handles that will be his biggest challenge' - Sam Curran sounds caution for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi ahead of ENG vs IND 2nd T20I
articles.description: Sam Curran highlighted some of the challenges that Vaibhav Sooryavanshi might face if he finally gets to make his India debut at the age of 15.

articles.title: England vs India Prediction, 2nd T20I – Who will win today’s match between ENG vs IND?
articles.description: England and India square off in the second T20I at Old Trafford, Manchester, on Saturday, July 4. The series is tied at 0-0, with the first game being washed out in Chester-le-Street on Wednesday.

articles.title: BBL set for historic India debut as Melbourne Renegades and Perth Scorchers likely to face off in Chennai
articles.description: The proposal is in its final stages and is subject to a formal agreement between Cricket Australia and the Asian Cricket Council.

articles.title: ENG vs IND 2026: 'Will definitely get an opportunity' - Parthiv Patel on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's non-selection
articles.description: Clamours for his debut have become increasingly fervent, but Sooryavanshi has yet to feature in the two T20Is against Ireland and one against England.

articles.title: 'Sanju Samson hasn’t done anything great since the World Cup' - S Badrinath’s brutal claim on Team India star ahead of 2nd T20I vs England
articles.description: "Timing is very important for a player in form. He should be given a chance when he is in the form of his life," Subramaniam Badrinath said about Vaibhav Sooryavanshi.
